description:
Though no one in Wonderland sleeps, Cordelia still dreams. And the Hatter's always there, because he occupies most of her waking thoughts and why should her dreams be any different? 

In her favorite dream, he's there with her. Not alive, of course, but that's just because he's finally gotten what he deserves, and now- well, now he knows how it feels. He gets her.

And it's nice, isn't it? Not to be alone?
